mano_cua.result_summary: Source Selector 状态同步 bug 已确认：通过左侧 EDIT SOURCES 入口勾选 Tome of Beasts + SRD 5.1 并 Update 后，页面正确过滤为 716 条结果(2/24)；但从右侧 SELECT SOURCES 入口重新打开模态框，所有源均显示未勾选(None)，两个入口状态不同步。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The modal is closed (cancelled). The page still shows 716 results with the filtered list containing SRD-2014 and TOB tagged items, confirming that 2 sources are still active (shown as '2/24' in the right toolbar). BUG DETECTED: The Source Selector modal opened via the right toolbar showed ALL items as unchecked (none selected), despite 2 sources being actively filtering results. The two entry points are NOT synchronized in their displayed states.
